description: This file defines the UsersRepository class which implements MongoDB operations related to user management, such as creating, retrieving, updating, and authenticating users in the database.

classes.name: UsersRepository
classes.description: A repository class for performing MongoDB operations related to user data, including creation, retrieval, updating, and authentication.

methods.name: col(self)
methods.description: Property to access the MongoDB collection 'users'.

methods.name: None ensure_indexes(self)
methods.description: Creates unique indexes on 'username' and 'email' fields for the users collection.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_id(self, user_id: ObjectId)
methods.description: Retrieves a user document by its ObjectId.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_username(self, username: str)
methods.description: Retrieves a user document by username.

methods.name: list[dict[str,Any]] list(self, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)
methods.description: Lists user documents with optional limit and offset.

methods.name: dict[str,Any] create_user( self, username: str, email: str, full_name: str, password: str, roles: list[RoleName], )
methods.description: Creates a new user document with specified details and returns it.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None update_user(self, user_id: ObjectId, updates: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Updates an existing user document by its ObjectId with provided fields.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None authenticate(self, username: str, password: str)
methods.description: Authenticates a user by verifying username and password, returning user data if successful.

ctags.name: authenticate
ctags.pattern: /^    async def authenticate(self, username: str, password: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: create_user
ctags.signature: ( self, username: str, email: str, full_name: str, password: str, roles: list[RoleName], )

ctags.name: get_by_id
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_id(self, user_id: ObjectId) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: get_by_username
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_username(self, username: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: list
ctags.pattern: /^    async def list(self, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:$/

ctags.name: update_user
ctags.pattern: /^    async def update_user(self, user_id: ObjectId, updates: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | /
